CalculateField 深圳区级边界 PID [OBJECTID] VB #
CalculateField 深圳区级边界 RID [FID] VB #
CalculateField 深圳区级边界 MID [FID]+1 VB #
CalculateField 深圳区级边界 MID [FID]+1 VB #
CalculateField 深圳区级边界 area "[Shape_Leng] /2/Sqr( [Shape_Area]*3.1415926)" VB #
CalculateField 深圳区级边界 shp "Sqr ( [area] )/ [peri]" VB #
CalculateField 深圳区级边界 MID [FID] VB #
CalculateField 深圳区级边界 MID [FID] VB #
CalculateField 深圳区级边界 sname [Name_CHN] VB #
DeleteField 深圳区级边界 sname
CalculateField 深圳区级边界 sname [Name_CHN] VB #
DeleteField 深圳区级边界 OBJECTID;Code;Type;Name_CHN;Name_ENG;Name_PY;area;peri;shp;MID
MultipartToSinglepart 深圳区级边界 C:\Users\Thinkpad\Documents\ArcGIS\Default1.gdb\深圳区级边界_MultipartToSinglepart1

Merge 深圳区级边界_MultipartToSinglepart1;深圳区级边界 C:\Users\Thinkpad\Documents\ArcGIS\Default1.gdb\深圳区级边界_MultipartToSinglepart2 "sname "sname" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,深圳区级边界_MultipartToSinglepart1,sname,-1,-1,深圳区级边界,sname,-1,-1;ORIG_FID "ORIG_FID" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,深圳区级边界_MultipartToSinglepart1,ORIG_FID,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,深圳区级边界_MultipartToSinglepart1,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,深圳区级边界_MultipartToSinglepart1,Shape_Area,-1,-1"

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
